title: Quantum Hitbox
description: Mod that gives you total control over entity hitboxes. Featuring real-time RGBA customization, smooth Chroma cycling, and advanced visibility filters, it's the ultimate tool for visual clarity and aesthetic Minecraft gameplay.
body:
# ✨ Quantum Hitbox Features

> Real-time RGBA Customization – Use intuitive sliders to pick any color and transparency level. Watch the changes happen instantly in the world as you move the bars!
> 
> Smooth Chroma (RGB) Mode – Enable dynamic color cycling with adjustable speed for a vibrant, animated hitbox experience.
> 
> Multiple Render Modes – Choose between a solid Fill, a sleek Outline, or Both to match your preferred visual style.
> 
> Advanced Visibility Filters – Fine-tune what you see: toggle hitboxes for all entities, only the one you're looking at (crosshair), or even invisible entities.
> 
> Self-Hitbox Hiding – Intelligently hides your own hitbox in first-person view to keep your screen clear while maintaining full visibility of others.
> 
> Native & Professional UI – A clean, intuitive configuration menu that integrates seamlessly via Mod Menu & Cloth Config.
> 
> Persistent Config – Your settings are automatically saved to a JSON file and reloaded every time you launch the game.

## 🎮 How to use

> Install the mod and launch Minecraft.
> 
> Open the config screen via Mod Menu or using your assigned keybinding (Check "Controls" to set your favorited key).
> 
> Adjust the Red, Green, and Blue sliders to find your perfect color.
> 
> Use the Alpha slider to set the transparency (affects both fill and outline!).
> 
> Toggle Chroma for a rainbow effect or change the Render Mode to switch between solid and outline looks.
> 
> Click Done to save. Your changes are visible instantly!

## 🐛 Bug reports & suggestions
> 
> Send me a DM on Discord: 
>

> ```
